zh.lifeSummary: Eva Margaretha Stab是Jois Reinhardi Stab和Margretha的女兒，於1610年出生在格洛斯黑爾左圖姆 賀瑟可萊斯 艾爾巴賀賀布斯塔爾。她於1643年與Peter Menges Jr.在德國賀瑟奧登瓦爾德可萊斯貝爾費爾登結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1691年8月17日在德國賀瑟奧登瓦爾德可萊斯澤斯巴賀塔爾享年81歲，埋葬在德國賀瑟可萊斯 奧芬巴赫奧芬巴赫 阿姆 麥澤利根斯塔特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Eva Margaretha Stab是Jois Reinhardi Stab和Margretha的女儿，于1610年出生在格洛斯黑爾左圖姆 賀瑟可萊斯 艾爾巴賀賀布斯塔爾。她于1643年与Peter Menges Jr.在德国賀瑟奧登瓦爾德可萊斯貝爾費爾登结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1691年8月17日在德国賀瑟奧登瓦爾德可萊斯澤斯巴賀塔爾享年81岁，埋葬在德国賀瑟可萊斯 奧芬巴赫奧芬巴赫 阿姆 麥澤利根斯塔特。

nameMeanings.name: Stab
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of Dutch Swaab, a habitational name for someone from Swabia, or of the German cognate Schwab .
Americanized form of Czech, Slovak, Rusyn (from Slovakia), Slovenian, and Croatian Šváb or Švab (see Svab ), and of the Polish cognate Szwab.

variants.name: Schwab
meanings: German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name for someone from Swabia (German Schwaben), from Middle High German Swāp, German Schwabe ‘Swabian’. The region takes its name from an ancient Germanic tribe recorded from the 1st century BC in the Latin form Suebi or Suevi, of uncertain origin; it was an independent duchy from the 10th century until 1313, when the territory was broken up. This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine), the Netherlands, and some other European countries (compare 2 below).
Germanized form of Czech, Slovak, Rusyn (from Slovakia), Slovenian, and Croatian Šváb or Švab (see Svab ).

nameMeanings.name: Eva
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Popular Latinate form of   Eve  , used also as an Anglicization of the Irish name Aoife .

nameMeanings.name: Margaretha
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaret
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margrethe
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

en.lifeSummary: Eva Margaretha Stab was born in 1610, in Hebstahl, Erbach, Grand Duchy of Hesse as the daughter of Jois Reinhardi Stab and Margretha. She married Peter Menges Jr. in 1643, in Beerfelden, Odenwaldkreis, Hesse, Germany. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 17 August 1691, in Sensbachtal, Odenwaldkreis, Hesse, Germany, at the age of 81, and was buried in Seligenstadt, Offenbach am Main, Offenbach, Hesse, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Eva Margaretha Stab est née en 1610, à Hebstahl, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen, fille de Jois Reinhardi Stab et Margretha. Elle a épousé Peter Menges Jr. en 1643, à Beerfelden, Odenwaldkreis, Hessen, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 17 août 1691, à Sensbachtal, Odenwaldkreis, Hessen, Allemagne, à l’âge de 81 ans, et a été enterrée à Seligenstadt, Offenbach am Main, Kreis Offenbach, Hessen, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Eva Margaretha Stab wurde 1610 in Hebstahl, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen, als Tochter von Jois Reinhardi Stab und Margretha geboren. Sie hat 1643 in Beerfelden, Odenwaldkreis, Hessen, Deutschland Peter Menges Jr. geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 17. August 1691 im Alter von 81 Jahren in Sensbachtal, Odenwaldkreis, Hessen, Deutschland und wurde in Seligenstadt, Offenbach am Main, Kreis Offenbach, Hessen, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Eva Margaretha Stab è nata il nel 1610 nel Hebstahl, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen come figlia di Jois Reinhardi Stab e Margretha. Lei sposato Peter Menges Jr. nel 1643, nel Beerfelden, Odenwaldkreis, Hessen, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 17 agosto 1691, nel Sensbachtal, Odenwaldkreis, Hessen, Germania, all'età di 81 anni, e fu sepolta a Seligenstadt, Offenbach am Main, Kreis Offenbach, Hessen, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Eva Margaretha Stabは1610年にグロssハーゾグトゥム ヘセンクレイス エルバチヘブスタhルでJois Reinhardi StabとMargrethaの娘として生まれた。1643年にドイツヘセンオデンワルドクレイスビールフエルデンでPeter Menges Jr.と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1691年8月17日にドイツヘセンオデンワルドクレイスセンスバチタルで81歳で死去し，ドイツヘセンクレイス オフエンバチオフエンバチ アム メインセリジェンスタトにて埋葬された。

ko.Hebstahl, Erbach, Hessen, Deutschland: 독일 볼크스타앳 헤센 크레이스 르바치 브스탈
ko.Hebstahl, Erbach, Odenwaldkreis, Hessen,: 독일 볼크스타앳 헤센 크레이스 르바치 브스탈
ko.Seligenstadt, Offenbach am Main, Hessen,: 독일 헤센 크레이스 펜바치 펜바치 아 맹 셀익스타드트
ko.lifeSummary: Eva Margaretha Stab(은)는 1610년 그로ss헤어즈그투 헤센 크레이스 르바치 브스탈에서 Jois Reinhardi Stab(와)과 Margretha의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1643년 독일 헤센 오데월드크레이스 브이르펠든에서 Peter Menges Jr.(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1691년 8월 17일 독일 헤센 오데월드크레이스 센스바ch탤에서 81세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 헤센 크레이스 펜바치 펜바치 아 맹 셀익스타드트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Eva Margaretha Stab nasceu em 1610, em Hebstahl, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen filha de Jois Reinhardi Stab e Margretha. Ela casou-se com Peter Menges Jr. em 1643, em Beerfelden, Odenwaldkreis, Hessen, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 17 de agosto de 1691, em Sensbachtal, Odenwaldkreis, Hessen, Alemanha, com 81 anos, e foi sepultada em Seligenstadt, Offenbach am Main, Kreis Offenbach, Hessen, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Eva Margaretha Stab родилась в 1610 г. в местности хебстахл, крис эрбач, гроssхирзогтум хессен. Её родителей звали Jois Reinhardi Stab и Margretha. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Peter Menges Jr. в 1643 г. в местности бирфелден, оденвалдкрис, Гессен, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 17 августа 1691 г. в местности сенсбачталь, оденвалдкрис, Гессен, Германия в возрасте 81 год и была похоронена в местности селидженстадт, оффенбач ам меин, крис оффенбач, Гессен, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Eva Margaretha Stab nació en 1610, en Hebstahl, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen como hija de Jois Reinhardi Stab y Margretha. Se casó con Peter Menges Jr. en 1643, en Beerfelden, Odenwaldkreis, Hessen, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 17 de agosto de 1691, en Sensbachtal, Odenwaldkreis, Hessen, Alemania, a la edad de 81 años, y fue sepultada en Seligenstadt, Offenbach am Main, Kreis Offenbach, Hessen, Alemania.
